text: I find myself surrounded by curiosity and subtle anticipation. The sights and sounds of the modern space around me, with its glass walls and technology on display, conjure a sense of transition—between ideas, between generations, and between disciplines. The tilt of my perspective adds a layer of strangeness, as if I am both participant and observer in a place dedicated to progress and learning. I am drawn to consider my own role: am I here to contribute, or merely to witness the unfolding of collective knowledge?
